title: Buddy Decision Envelope (audit schema v2)
description: JSON Schema for buddy v3 verification decision records written to ~/.buddy/logs.jsonl. Schema v2 unifies field names with the lifecycle event stream (session-log).

turn.description: Turn number in the verification sequence

rule.description: Name or identifier of the verification rule applied

triggered.description: Whether the rule was triggered in this turn

evidence.description: Array of evidence items supporting the decision

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. v2 rename of legacy 'timestamp'.

buddy_session_id.description: Buddy session id, joins with session-log. v2 rename of legacy 'session_id'.

verification_task_id.description: Task id, joins with session-log events. Null only on legacy entries.

workspace.description: Project working directory at time of decision

message.description: Optional free-text note attached by runtime
